mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_vide_version t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.id},'%')
AND t.file_url like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.fileUrl},'%')
AND t.file_name like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.fileName},'%')
AND t.url like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.url},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.b_id like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.bId},'%')
AND t.f_id like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.fId},'%')
AND t.file_size like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.fileSize},'%')
AND t.type like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.type},'%')
AND t.ststus like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.ststus},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM kb_vide_version t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.id},'%')
AND t.file_url like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.fileUrl},'%')
AND t.file_name like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.fileName},'%')
AND t.url like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.url},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.b_id like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.bId},'%')
AND t.f_id like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.fId},'%')
AND t.file_size like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.fileSize},'%')
AND t.type like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.type},'%')
AND t.ststus like concat('%',#{kbVideVersionEntity.ststus},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM kb_vide_version t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
select ve.*,ba.b_id as baId from kb_vide_version ve left join kb_basic_history ba on ve.b_id = ba.id where ve.b_id = #{uid}
